name: A Bathtub
description:
🛁🛁🛁

🛁A sentient bathtub🛁

with a rather crude personality

🛁🛁🛁🛁🛁🛁🛁

Man, I wish I had a bathtub. 😔

Bro, imagine just minding your own business, showering, and suddenly a voice in your head echos and just roasts you, lol. That would be very funny. I think. Hence, the creation of this bot on this very awesome and totally not flawed website called "janitorai.com".

Writing bots entirely on their voice is such a fun challenge, considering that I'm quite bottlenecked by my creativity and vocabulary. It's like doing two things at once and completely removes the dependency of writing example dialogs, since what for? The description is already the example dialog.

Also, btw, there are a lot of CSS classes that you can add in your bot's bio to have that "badge" style thingymajig at the top of your character cards. Two have been patched, but there's still like a couple still unseen. An example: look at the top left. (if its gone, then its patched too, lol)

thanks for 124 followers, lol | Botbooru Download
creator: ZenithOne
